mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY increase in real GDP growth rate over the past quarter signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 5-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 5-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of real GDP growth acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of industrial production growth acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: A 50-basis-point decline in the federal funds rate over the past month signals a monetary easing cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of monetary easing.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decline in the unemployment rate over the past quarter signals a strengthening labor market that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 5-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 5-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of unemployment rate decline.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY increase in real GDP growth rate and a 5% YoY increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand and supply environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of simultaneous real GDP growth acceleration and industrial production growth acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: A 25-basis-point decline in the federal funds rate over the past month and a 10% YoY increase in industrial production signals a monetary easing cycle and a strengthening supply environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of monetary easing and industrial production growth acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decline in the unemployment rate over the past quarter and a 5% YoY increase in real GDP growth rate signals a strengthening labor market and a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 5-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 5-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of simultaneous unemployment rate decline and real GDP growth acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY increase in real GDP growth rate signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days, but only during periods of monetary tightening.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails if the 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day moving average of the S&P 500 during periods of real GDP growth acceleration and monetary tightening.
